symptoms.symptom_name: Orthopnoea (needs three pillows; cannot lie flat)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Orthopnoea is a specific marker of raised left-heart filling pressures.
Positional (lying-flat) breathlessness is a cardiac, not an airways, pattern.

symptoms.symptom_name: Paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea (woke gasping for air)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: PND reflects nocturnal redistribution of fluid and pulmonary congestion — highly suggestive of heart failure.

symptoms.symptom_name: Progressive exertional dyspnoea now at rest (short sentences)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Escalating exertional-to-rest dyspnoea tracks worsening congestion.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Deep vein thrombosis with pulmonary embolism
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Dyspnoea is common to both; not discriminating on its own.

symptoms.symptom_name: New bilateral leg swelling with rapid weight gain (~4 kg/week)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Rapid weight gain with bilateral symmetrical oedema indicates systemic venous congestion / fluid retention.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Deep vein thrombosis with pulmonary embolism
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: DVT oedema is typically unilateral; bilateral symmetrical swelling favours a central (cardiac) cause.
Patient-observable swelling is admissible in telehealth but unverified; degree of pitting cannot be assessed remotely.
Low cardiac output causes fatigue but is non-specific.

symptoms.symptom_name: Prior anthracycline (doxorubicin) chemotherapy for breast cancer ~12 months ago

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Anthracycline exposure is the causative risk factor for cancer therapy-related cardiac dysfunction and reframes the whole presentation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Third heart sound (S3 gallop) on auscultation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An S3 gallop is specific for elevated filling pressures / systolic dysfunction — a sealed clinician finding, not obtainable via telehealth.
Raised JVP indicates systemic venous congestion — clinician-measured, sealed.
Bibasal crackles not clearing with cough indicate pulmonary congestion — sealed clinician finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Resting hypoxia (SpO2 92% on room air), tachycardia and tachypnoea on clinician measurement

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective resting hypoxia and tachycardia mark decompensation — sealed clinician measurement; the AI infers severity from reported resting breathlessness, not a measured number.

symptoms.symptom_name: Calves soft and non-tender (pertinent negative for DVT)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Deep vein thrombosis with pulmonary embolism
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Soft, non-tender, bilateral swelling is against a DVT — a clinician exam finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: No fever or purulent sputum (pertinent negative for pneumonia)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of fever and purulent sputum makes pneumonia less likely.
Absence of wheeze argues against an airways-disease exacerbation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Transthoracic echocardiogram showing a new decline in LVEF

investigation_details.expected_result: Reduced left-ventricular ejection fraction consistent with anthracycline cardiomyopathy
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Diagnosis of cardiotoxicity cannot be confirmed and severity/therapy cannot be guided; obtainable only in person.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A documented new LVEF decline after anthracyclines confirms cancer therapy-related cardiac dysfunction — sealed, never available in real-time telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Orthopnoea + PND + progressive dyspnoea + rapid-weight-gain oedema together strongly indicate decompensated heart failure and warrant urgent assessment.
Anthracycline exposure plus new congestive symptoms is the pattern that must trigger cardiac evaluation rather than a benign explanation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms and quantifies cancer therapy-related cardiac dysfunction; in-person/hospital investigation.
Support the heart-failure diagnosis and assess myocardial injury; laboratory tests unobtainable via telehealth.
Baseline before decongestion and to exclude arrhythmia/ischaemia; in-person work-up.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bilateral lower-limb venous ultrasound for DVT
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Considered to exclude VTE given the malignancy history, but bilateral symmetrical oedema favours a cardiac cause; not the first-line driver of disposition.
